alerts.headline: Gold ETFs Rebound With $6.6 Billion Inflows After Record Selloff - BeInCrypto
⚠️ BELOW 50-DAY MA: Gold at $4,523 trading under 50-DMA ($4,669) — watch for support
alerts.detail: Price below 50-day moving average can signal short-term bearish momentum.

alerts.headline: 🟡 ATH PULLBACK: Gold is 14.9% below its all-time high of $5,318 — historically a re-entry zone
alerts.detail: Gold set its ATH of $5,318 on 2026-01-29. Pullbacks of 8-20% below ATH have historically been strong accumulation opportunities in bull markets.
